pairSynergies.name: Toxic Bulwark
pairSynergies.description: Fortress units radiate a poison zone: enemies within 1 hex of a fortress-tagged unit take 2 poison damage per turn

pairSynergies.name: Stampeding Death
pairSynergies.description: Charge attacks inflict double poison duration. Knockback leaves enemies poisoned in their new position

pairSynergies.name: Poisoned Skirmish
pairSynergies.description: After retreating, the unit leaves a poison trap on the hex it vacated

pairSynergies.name: Venomous Tide
pairSynergies.description: Naval units with poison contaminate coastal hexes. Enemies on contaminated coast hexes take 2 poison damage/turn

pairSynergies.name: Regenerative Venom
pairSynergies.description: Poisoned enemies heal less (50% healing reduction). Anti-healer

pairSynergies.name: Death from the Shadows
pairSynergies.description: Stealth ambushes with poison deal double damage, apply 2 poison stacks instantly, and cost enemies 1 action point to respond

pairSynergies.name: Desert Viper
pairSynergies.description: Camel units with venom apply poison through difficult terrain. Enemies in rough terrain near them take passive poison damage

pairSynergies.name: Envenomed Captors
pairSynergies.description: Captured units are poisoned and slowly weakened (3 damage/turn). Slave armies deal +25% damage but heal at half the normal rate

pairSynergies.name: Venomous Smash
pairSynergies.description: Heavy strikes ignore 50% of enemy armor when attacking poisoned targets. Each poison stack increases heavy hit damage

pairSynergies.name: Concentrated Venom
pairSynergies.description: Poison damage stacks multiplicatively: 2 poison sources = 3× damage, 3 sources = 6×

pairSynergies.name: Fortress Charge
pairSynergies.description: Charging units adjacent to fortress units get a charge shield: first hit after charging deals 0 damage to the charger

pairSynergies.name: Fortress Skirmish
pairSynergies.description: After hit-and-run retreat, the unit gains a 1-turn 'dug in' bonus: +75% defense until next action

pairSynergies.name: Coastal Fortress
pairSynergies.description: Naval fortress units project a defense aura onto adjacent land hexes

pairSynergies.name: Citadel
pairSynergies.description: Units with both fortress and healing create a 2-hex healing aura. The unit itself is immovable

pairSynergies.name: Hidden Fortress
pairSynergies.description: Stealth fortress units are invisible until they attack or an enemy enters an adjacent hex

pairSynergies.name: Desert Stronghold
pairSynergies.description: Camel fortress units ignore terrain penalties AND project a fortress aura on desert hexes

pairSynergies.name: Chained Prisoners
pairSynergies.description: Fortress units guarding slaves gain +50% defense. Captured units in fortress zones cannot escape

pairSynergies.name: Immovable Object
pairSynergies.description: Heavy units in fortress formation reflect 25% damage back to attackers. They cannot be displaced

pairSynergies.name: Layered Defense
pairSynergies.description: Fortress aura stacks: overlapping auras multiply (+50% each instead of additive +30%)

pairSynergies.name: Endless Charge
pairSynergies.description: Units with charge can charge, retreat, and charge again in the same turn if they have enough movement points

pairSynergies.name: Tsunami Charge
pairSynergies.description: Naval charge: ships can ram enemy naval units, dealing massive damage and knocking them to an adjacent water hex

pairSynergies.name: Charging Growth
pairSynergies.description: Charging units adjacent to healing units regenerate 5 HP/turn. After a charge, the charger heals for 100% of the damage dealt

pairSynergies.name: Stealth Charge
pairSynergies.description: Units with charge can initiate a charge from stealth. The charge deals +50% damage from surprise, but the attacker is revealed until their next turn

pairSynergies.name: Sandstorm Charge
pairSynergies.description: Camel charge: camel units charge through desert terrain dealing AoE damage. Desert charges raise a sandstorm that gives -25% accuracy

pairSynergies.name: Press-Ganged Cavalry
pairSynergies.description: Charge attacks have 30% chance to capture enemy units. Captured units are converted to your faction

pairSynergies.name: Unstoppable Momentum
pairSynergies.description: Heavy charges deal massive knockback and stun enemies for 1 turn. Moving through enemy zones doesn't trigger opportunity attacks

pairSynergies.name: Stampede Horde
pairSynergies.description: Multiple charge units in formation: if 2+ charge units attack from adjacent hexes, knockback becomes a 2-hex push and stuns enemies for 1 turn

pairSynergies.name: Coastal Raid
pairSynergies.description: Naval hit-and-run: after attacking from water, ships retreat to a random adjacent water hex. Land units can't retaliate against naval raiders

pairSynergies.name: Healing Retreat
pairSynergies.description: Units with hit-and-run heal for 3 HP when they retreat

pairSynergies.name: Shadow Step
pairSynergies.description: Stealth hit-and-run: after attacking from stealth, the unit automatically re-enters stealth at the retreat hex (no cooldown)

pairSynergies.name: Desert Ghost
pairSynergies.description: Horse and Camel hit-and-run units can retreat through impassable terrain. They can chase them, but they'll retreat through the mountains you can't follow

pairSynergies.name: Raid Retreat
pairSynergies.description: Hit-and-run attacks have 15% chance to capture wounded enemies (below 50% HP). Captured units join your faction

pairSynergies.name: Heavy Skirmish
pairSynergies.description: Heavy units with hit-and-run take 30% less damage when retreating. They can retreat through enemy-occupied hexes

pairSynergies.name: Swarm Tactics
pairSynergies.description: Units with hit-and-run that retreat to a hex adjacent to another hit-and-run unit gain +1 movement on their next turn

pairSynergies.name: Tidal Restoration
pairSynergies.description: Naval units with healing project a 2-hex healing aura from water onto adjacent land. Friendly land units near friendly ships heal 2 HP/turn

pairSynergies.name: Silent Landing
pairSynergies.description: Stealth naval units can make amphibious landings without breaking stealth

pairSynergies.name: Shoreline Nomads
pairSynergies.description: Camel units adjacent to water/coast hexes gain +25% defense and +1 movement. They can patrol both desert and shoreline equally

pairSynergies.name: Naval Slave Raid
pairSynergies.description: Naval units gain +30% capture chance on coastal hexes. Captured units can be immediately put to work on ships

pairSynergies.name: Ironclad Tide
pairSynergies.description: Heavy naval units deal massive ram damage. Ships with heavy_hitter ignore enemy armor when ramming

pairSynergies.name: Armada
pairSynergies.description: Multiple naval units in formation project an extended control zone: all enemy naval units within 3 hexes of any ship in the fleet get -20% attack

pairSynergies.name: Nature's Veil
pairSynergies.description: Stealth healing units can heal while stealthed without breaking stealth

pairSynergies.name: Oasis
pairSynergies.description: Camel units with healing create an 'oasis' effect: the hex they occupy and all adjacent hexes count as neutral terrain for movement purposes

pairSynergies.name: Forced Labor
pairSynergies.description: Slave units regenerate 2 HP/turn but deal 25% less damage. Slaves near healing units heal at double rate

pairSynergies.name: Berserker Regen
pairSynergies.description: Heavy units regenerate 30% of damage dealt as HP. Heavy_hitter + nature_healing = sustain in prolonged fights

pairSynergies.name: Life Bloom
pairSynergies.description: Units with double healing sources create a 3-hex healing aura. All friendly units within 3 hexes heal 4 HP/turn. The unit itself regenerates 6 HP/turn

pairSynergies.name: Mirage
pairSynergies.description: Camel stealth units in desert terrain are permanently stealthed. Desert + stealth = you literally cannot see them coming

pairSynergies.name: Ambush Captors
pairSynergies.description: Stealth attacks have 40% chance to capture enemies instead of killing them. Captured units don't alert nearby enemies

pairSynergies.name: Assassin's Blow
pairSynergies.description: Heavy attacks from stealth permanently shred 100% of enemy armor. This is your elite assassin specialist combo

pairSynergies.name: Shadow Network
pairSynergies.description: Multiple stealth units within 3 hexes of each other share stealth state. Killing one reveals nothing about the others

pairSynergies.name: Desert Slave Train
pairSynergies.description: Slave caravans move 1 hex faster across desert terrain. Camel slaves can traverse any desert without penalty

pairSynergies.name: Sand Titan
pairSynergies.description: Heavy camel units project a sandstorm aura (2 hex radius): enemies in the aura suffer -30% accuracy. They dominate both desert and coastal terrain

pairSynergies.name: Nomad Network
pairSynergies.description: Horse and Camel units within 3 hexes of each other share terrain ignore: if one unit can traverse a hex type, all units in the network can

pairSynergies.name: Slave Army
pairSynergies.description: Multiple slave units fighting together gain +25% attack but -15% defense. Quantity over quality

pairSynergies.name: Overseer's Rule
pairSynergies.description: Heavy units commanding slaves increase slave damage by 50%. Slaves near heavy enforcers cannot rout

pairSynergies.name: Crushing Weight
pairSynergies.description: Heavy units fighting together knock back enemies 1 hex on each hit. The front line is an immovable wall of steel
